creator: freebsd@elgert.dk
text:
New gpsbabel version 1.7.0 available on:
https://www.gpsbabel.org/download.html#downloading

Many updates to "fit v2" format and should also remove fault present in 1.6 that generates:

"Using QCharRef with an index pointing outside the valid range of a QString. The corresponding behavior is deprecated, and will be changed in a future version of Qt."
